location.office_time_required: some time in-office and some time remote

secondary_archetype: Growth PM (local markets operator with people management)

level_signals: Manages a Strategy + Operations team in-market
Comp range $136K-$200K base consistent with manager level
Explicitly required to have led and motivated a team before

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 6+ years of experience. You've succeeded in high-performance cultures (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
You have led and motivated a team before
You have a talent for summarizing complex problems, can translate high-level goals into relevant plans
You have a bias towards action and can thrive in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment
You're willing to get your hands dirty and you're open to feedback
You crave responsibility and want to shape the direction of the market
You have experience in a complex or high-growth environment
Bachelor's degree required, MBA or Masters Degree a plus

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Early stage startup experience a plus
Bachelor's degree required, MBA or Masters Degree a plus
Logistics, Product Management, Business Operations and/or Partnerships experience a plus

scope.surface: Southeast & Texas regional markets (Atlanta, Charlotte, Nashville, Austin, Houston); all three sides of the Marketplace — customer, merchant, Dasher
scope.business_model: marketplace / on-demand delivery, B2C and B2B
primary_metrics_inferred: Market share in Southeast and Texas
core_responsibilities: Set and drive towards regional targets for growth and profitability
Recruit, lead, and develop high-performing candidates on the US Local Markets team
Work cross-functionally to support strategic projects and unlock opportunities to grow region
Figure out how to get from A to B and make it happen
Run tests and scale insights; embrace ambiguity and multiple paths forward

green_flags: People management role with direct reports
Comprehensive benefits package including 16 weeks paid parental leave, 401(k) with employer match
Applications accepted on ongoing basis — likely active hire
Multiple city options offered across two regions
red_flags: Hybrid requirement in specific cities (Atlanta, Charlotte, Nashville, Austin, Houston) — not remote-eligible
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD
Salary range is wide ($64K spread), suggesting leveling flexibility that could indicate uncertainty about seniority

Role title includes 'Growth' but responsibilities are primarily strategy & operations / general management; archetype set to BizOps / Strategy & Ops with secondary note on growth.
